reason: Canvas/Agent/Extension/Session 的事实链、断口与组件 ABI 对照
Operation invocation、actor context、admission、trace 与 cancellation 主链路
Program step 与 Agent 普通 tool call 共享 capability/approval/finalize
AgentRun、RuntimeSession、AgentFrame 与 Interaction attachment 边界
Canvas definition/source 与 AgentFrame VFS projection 边界
OperationProgram 与 durable Workflow 的职责边界
WorkspacePanel、Canvas runtime 与 Extension renderer 组合边界
Interaction canonical state、projection 与 UI local state 分层
Extension component host、props/events 与组合规范
Interaction/Program/component contracts 与 generated TS 一致性
